meaning: n.拖拉(印度的金银重量单位,等于0.4114盎司)
examples: And after Abimelech there arose to defend Israel Tola the son of Puah, the.
After the time of Abimelech a man of Issachar, Tola son of Puah, the son of Dodo, rose to save Israel.
And after Abimelech there arose to defend Israel Tola the son of Puah, the son of Dodo, a man of Issachar; and he dwelt in Shamir in mount Ephraim.
